narrative_markdown:
## Fairness Audit Narrative
### What we found
Our fairness audit has identified three disparities in the model's performance.
### Evidence (numbers)
The selection rate disparity between female and male is 0.1108, indicating a moderate level of demographic bias.
The true positive rate disparity between young and adult is 0.0367, indicating an unequal opportunity for certain groups.
The false positive rate disparity between young and adult is 0.0619, indicating a mild level of harm to certain groups.
### Likely causes (hypotheses)
Model selection bias may be the cause of these disparities.
### Recommended next tests
To further investigate these disparities, we recommend running feature distribution comparison and proxy detection.
### Mitigations to consider
No mitigations are currently available for this model.
### Limits / Unknowns
The minimum group size is set at 30, which may not be sufficient to capture certain patterns in the data.
